claims.claim: Soft terminal marginalization is a useful small-tabular estimator/equivalence mechanism under audited reward normalization and adequate coverage.
numeric_evidence: 0001 soft variance 0 vs sampled variance up to 0.0904013

claims.claim: RiverSwim learning advantages are coverage-qualified rather than unconditional.
Independent tabular real-state goal slices are correct and do not perturb g_plus.
The tested rank-4 NumPy low-rank real-state auxiliary approach improves g_plus.
Real-state auxiliary goals are generally impossible or useless.
numeric_evidence: Only one tiny rank-4 architecture family and replay construction were tested.

claims.claim: Neural, large-environment, GPU, or online-exploration generality follows from this evidence.
numeric_evidence: No neural framework, GPU training, larger environment, or broad online robustness run exists in 0001-0011.
